party.nazevCz: F2 DAY RAVE: Helena Hauff ★ Nina Farrina ★ Nastya Muravyova ★ Midirama
party.autor: Helena Hauff, Nina Farrina, Nastya Muravyova
party.popis:
Last year the amphitheatre layout of Štvanice caught our eye, and we've been thinking about it ever since. Now we're finally taking over the central tennis court, not with a standard concert setup, but with a full-day event. Helena Hauff was our first choice when we started thinking about who to invite for a day rave on Saturday, August 15, and we're genuinely glad she said yes.

Helena plays vinyl only, and that shaped how we put the lineup together. We went through our Fuchs2 residents and picked artists with a strong connection to that format: Nina Farrina, Nastya Muravyova and Midirama, building the court's atmosphere all the way up to Helena's set.

We're shaping the space again from scratch, this time around a day rave feel, and honestly we'd love this to become a recurring thing, something you help build with us.

After the day outside, the night continues at Fuchs2 and Bike Jesus with a series of special back-to-back sets, bringing together our residents, local favourites and a handful of exciting international guests. Expect unique combinations.

We kept ticket prices as low as we could. Keep an eye on early-bird and 1st-wave tickets, and even at the door you won't feel the damage.

★★★

party.popis:
Ever imagined yourself living in a grimy cyberpunk dystopia? Well... AI is here and it definitely ain't what we all thought it would be. Instead of using it, to free ourselves from the shackles of our daily routine reality and unleash our inner potential, we let it rob us of one thing that makes us inherently human - the ability to express our thoughts and emotions.

We would like to invite you all to our first VOID Collective showcase at the legendary Ankali club. This time our crew will present itself in its full force, with each performer showing a completely different interpretation of the same idea. This is a showcase of skill, creativity and determination. Individualism and teamwork. Dream becoming reality. There is no place for copy-cats here.

As out special guest we decided to invite ESTER, a persona that has definitely left a lasting mark on Prague's underground and who's artistic vision really resonates with us.

...for humans, by humans.

This time, for Friday, July 24, Midirama invited someone special to share the main stage with him: Mareena, Tresor resident since 2012, producer and a seriously great DJ. Raphael Kosmos opens, and if you know him, you know he's no rookie when it comes to setting the tone before these two take over.

Salo stage has a surprise too. Nina Farrina is finally playing vinyl in front of you, and she's bringing 3ever along, her partner on the decks and off them too. Main stage keeps it techno, but these two are taking Salo into house territory for the night.

No photo policy this time, so no need to worry about how your hair looks at 4 am. Just be in the room, dance, lose yourself a bit, and let the night stay where it happened.

party.nazevCz: Grau Series: [Indoor/Outdoor] with Blue Hour (UK/DE), Adamatron b2b Fake Agent, Marie Pravda+more
party.popis:
Long days, warm nights and Grau Series is finally back at Altenburg 1964 after a year. Two stages, indoor & outdoor, and everything what summer is supposed to feel like.

Leading the night is Blue Hour. Over a decade deep into artistry, Blue Hour continues to shape techno with his own sound, labels and collaborations. His deeply immersive approach has earned him apperances at some of the world's most respected clubs, including Berghain, Bassiani and FOLD, further cementing his position as one of the most complelling voices in contemporary techno. A treat for Grau Series regulars and anyone who has been chasing this sound for a while.

Backing him up is a proper local crew. Adamatron b2b Fake Agent bring their hereandthere energy to the booth. Fake Agent's take on rave nostalgia meeting Adamatron's warehouse instincts. Arton, a steady presence across Prague's Weltraum nights, joins the bill, alongside Etienn Grey - who needs no introduction here, being the founding force behind Grau Series itself.

Outside, the chill stage is in trusted hands. Expect a well curated atmosphere, perfect to enjoy the softer side of the summer night. Marie Pravda, always ready to charm the audience, will be spinning her signature blend of psychedelia and storytelling, alongside Kirill Astra, whose sets have been shaping Prague's scene since 2015. The next on the list is Jesse who will suprise us with his soft (limits) selection. Ishka Machina rounds it out, bringing her style to the first light and beyond.

Two stages, one summer night and a lot of new memories.
Outside opens at 20:00, while the light is still soft.

party.nazevCz: Generate - djs Bøgen (Berlin) b2b Vlad Yaki (Berlin), Kleitone, Danjela
party.adresa: Nábřeží Ludvíka Svobody 1, 110 00 Prague, Czech Republic
party.popis:
The next part of Generate is here! You can look forward to sailing in deep house waves to melodic techno.

BØGEN is the artistic identity of Hugo Arcos, a Chilean-born DJ, producer and label founder based in Berlin. Known for his driving, atmospheric take on techno and melodic electronic music, he crafts immersive sets shaped by raw grooves, deep progressions and cinematic textures. Active since 2013, he has performed across South America, Europe and North Africa, with appearances at Mysteryland, Defqon.1, ADE, Ritter Butzke, Sisyphos and major cultural institutions. His releases and remixes have charted internationally on Beatport and Apple Music. He is also the founder of the Berlin-based label and event series Voragyne and works as a mixing and mastering engineer, mentor and educator.

VLAD YAKI is a Berlin-based Ukrainian DJ and producer known for high-energy, uplifting performances and a strong connection with the crowd. Formerly one of Ukraine’s most in-demand artists, he quickly established himself in Berlin with gigs at clubs like Sisyphos and Kater Blau, a residency at rooftop club Klunkerkranich, and his own party series. His driving sound has gained wide recognition across Germany through tours and sets on the major radio station Sunshine Live.

Sonority Is an electronic music producer and Live & DJ performer Jan Hanak. His music offers a dynamic blend of different musical styles ranging from Techno, House and IDM to experimental electronic music.

The common denominator of his recordings and live performances is rich sound fusing dreamy melodies, noise, ecstacy and energy. Sonority also composes music for theatre in neo-classical style with an array of influences which range from electronica to minimalism.

Sonority’s own tunes and remixes have been released on a variety of labels (Manual Music, 3rd Avenue, Toast & Jam, Fenestra (Einmusika), Distinctive Rec, Liquid Rec) and he often perfoms at well-known Czech festivals (Colours of Ostrava, Let It Roll, Spectaculare) as well as at international ones like Wilsonic, Electronic Beats and Springfestival.

party.nazevCz: SEELEN LABEL NIGHT: JANEIN ☆ Stigmatique ☆ TerminusTechnikus ☆ Divný útvar
party.popis:
Leipzig always had its own thing. Its own club. Its own scene. Its own sound. And Seelen. is exactly the kind of thing that grows out of a place like that and refuses to move. On Saturday, August 1, they'll return to Prague's F2.

Janein and Stigmatique launched their label in 2018 and have handled everything themselves since day one: distribution, artwork, shipping. Vinyl only, no industry middlemen, rooted in Leipzig and slowly spreading far beyond it. Both of them came up through hardcore, punk, and metal, and you can hear it: this is techno with no interest in flattering you. Janein's sound is dark, heavy and emotionally loaded. Stigmatique plays uncompromising, hypnotic, linear sets: two different approaches, one label, one vision.

Salo will be all about broken beats. At our second stage, it's all about broken beats. TerminusTechnikus and Divný útvar each walk their own path, but tonight they meet somewhere between bass music, cosmic disco and years' worth of dancefloor surprises from their personal collections.

With the weight of the current political situation, we knew that celebrating Pride as a queer collective was non-negotiable.

Last year, we had an unforgettable Pride celebration with BRUXA at Ankali in Prague. A night that reminded us how powerful the connection between music, community, and freedom can be.

It only felt natural to join forces again this year. Together with BRUXA, our EERIE residents, and some of our closest friends, we’re creating another special night.

This time, we’re also bringing a Berlin connection: @lixilixilixi.zip b2b @sub.sahara, bringing their unique blend of sexy techno and progressive house to Prague.

Expect deep hypnosis, raw intensity, sexy grooves, and collective release.

Come celebrate Pride with us.

Never Sol se vrací do Ctrl+Play. Její mnohovrstevnatý přístup promění industriální zvuky 3D tiskáren v unikátní hudební performance, kterou jinde návštěvníci nezažijí.

Never Sol je umělecký pseudonym pražské hudebnice, skladatelky a producentky Sary Vondráškové. V centru jejího tvůrčího procesu stojí modulární syntezátory a hlas. Vytváří emocionálně nabité kompozice propojující analogové syntezátory, produkci s výrazným použitím reverbu a katarzní vokální textury. Se svým sólovým projektem vydala dvě studiová alba, se kterými absolvovala evropská turné. Never Sol se také věnuje komponování hudby pro současný tanec, divadlo a film a moderuje rozhlasový pořad na Českém rozhlase Vltava zaměřený na alternativní a experimentální hudební scénu.

party.nazevCz: House Of Love ✶ HOVR (DE - Stil vor Talent) ✶ Pride Parade Afterparty
party.popis:
Let’s close Prague Pride the way it deserves - with love, freedom, queer expression, a packed dancefloor, and exactly the right amount of chaos.

✶ Main Stage - playful, sexy, and bursting with energy!
At the heart of it all is HOVR - a non-binary multi-instrumentalist, DJ, producer, and one of the most exciting names to emerge from Berlin’s club scene. With hundreds of shows around the world, appearances at Burning Man, dozens of releases, and an acclaimed HÖR Berlin set, HOVR brings together emotion, playfulness, and a fresh take on modern house. Expect the energy of their new album Love Language in full force.

✶ Joining them behind the decks are Viktor Beech, a Slovak choreographer and DJ whose sound is rooted in the ballroom community; Fembot, the hyperfeminine force behind the Extravgnza club night; and Radio 1 host Telly, serving disco, soulful house, and jackin’ grooves.

✶ But it will not be just about the DJs. Velvet Legacy - voguing dance collective will light up the stage with performance and full ballroom energy, while Silk & Steel take things above the crowd with aerial acrobatics over the dancefloor.

When you need a break from the glitter - or simply want more techno - head to the Second Stage.

✶ Second Stage - darker, hypnotic, and unapologetic!
Prague collective Weltraum takes the room into darker territory. Axis Alpha, Eva Falt and Arton move through Berlin-inspired techno, hypnotic grooves, trippy atmospheres, darker sounds and heavy, rolling basslines.

✶ No strict dress code. Come in whatever makes you feel hot, free, and most like yourself. Keep it low-key or go fully extra. The dancefloor is yours.

House of Love is a space for freedom, respect, and connection. Racism, transphobia, homophobia, sexism, and any form of harassment are not welcome here.

party.popis:
SUMMER IN THE HEART OF PRAGUE

Roxy is an icon of Prague’s club scene. Since 1992, we’ve been setting the standard for the best night in town, and this year we cemented that status by winning the 2025 Bass Awards for Best Club in the Czech Republic and Slovakia. This summer, we’re not just throwing a party—we’re creating the ultimate experience for all the senses.

Sound Like No Other
We have the most advanced sound system available today—d&b Soundscape. Over forty speakers will surround you with perfect spatial sound, allowing you to hear every detail no matter where you stand. You won’t experience this anywhere else in Europe.

Your summer checklist
We know a party isn’t just about music. That’s why this year we’ve fine-tuned the elements that will ensure exceptional nights:

Visual experience: A special light show synchronized with our immersive projections will transport you to other dimensions.
Memories in your pocket: Don’t even think about your phone. Our photographer with an Instax and a stylish photobooth will make sure you take your moments home with you.
Chill Zone: We’ve expanded our seating capacity. When you need to unwind for a moment, we’ve got a place for you.
Energy: Our animator with a CO2 gun will take care of that, and we’ll throw in some fresh popcorn—because a hungry raver isn’t a good raver.

Special Drink Deals
This summer, we’ve prepared a menu for you that will give you the right start:

Chupito Deal: 6 shots for 400 CZK (4+2 free offer)
Olmeca Special: 6 shots for 600 CZK

ROXY is home to legends
Roxy is regularly chosen by the biggest stars on the global scene. Amelie Lens, Sub Focus, Fatboy Slim, Solomun, Charli XCX, Chase & Status... Who will be next? Check out our lineup—summer is in full swing, and we have more big names lined up.

Marcus Fuereder, známější jako Parov Stelar, je jedním z nejúspěšnějších rakouských umělců a průkopníkem žánru „Electro Swing“.

Mistrovsky propojuje hudbu a umění a přináší jedinečnou kombinaci rytmů, díky které odehrál více než 1 000 elektrizujících koncertů, včetně vystoupení na ikonických festivalech jako Coachella, Glastonbury a Lollapalooza. Je velmi vyhledávaný pro spolupráce a remixy, pracoval mimo jiné s umělci jako Tony Bennett & Lady Gaga, Lana Del Rey nebo Bryan Ferry.

Na svém kontě má 10 ocenění Amadeus Austrian Music Awards a jeho globální dosah potvrzuje více než 3 miliony měsíčních posluchačů na Spotify i velké hity jako dvojitě platinová skladba „All Night“ nebo americké iTunes jedničky „The Sun“ a „Brass Devil“.

Tento nezapomenutelný večer se odehraje při západu slunce v úchvatném prostředí Křižíkovy fontány, kde nasvícené vodní efekty a nová světelná show posunou zážitek na zcela novou úroveň.

Nenechte si ujít jedinečnou příležitost zažít tuto světovou show živě v Praze dne 24.07.2026 v Křižíkově fontáně!

--------

Marcus Fuereder, better known as Parov Stelar, is one of Austria’s most successful artists and a pioneering figure in the 'Electro Swing' genre.

Masterfully fusing music and art, he delivers a unique blend of beats that has led to over 1,000 electrifying live performances, including at such iconic festivals as Coachella, Glastonbury, and Lollapalooza. Highly sought after for collaborations, he has worked with and remixed tracks for iconic artists including Tony Bennett & Lady Gaga, Lana Del Rey and Bryan Ferry.

With 10 Amadeus Austrian Music Awards to his name, his global impact is cemented by 3 million monthly Spotify listeners and massive hits like the Double Platinum track "All Night", as well as US iTunes chart-toppers "The Sun" and "Brass Devil".

This unforgettable evening will unfold at sunset in the stunning setting of Křižík Fountain, where illuminated water effects and a new light show will elevate the experience to anot

No complicated theme.

NO DOOR SALE ON THE SPOT, ONLY ONLINE TICKETS

Many people first discover Kinky Fridays because of the atmosphere — but keep coming back because of the music.

Everything remains based on consent, respect and personal choice.

You can simply enjoy the music and atmosphere, meet new people, or explore deeper parts of the experience entirely at your own pace.

What started as a crazy idea between Wildog and a group of Belgian friends in 2023 has grown into one of the most anticipated traditions of Let It Roll week.

Now entering its 4th edition, Keep It Roll returns to Prague's legendary Cross Club for its biggest chapter yet.

After three unforgettable years, countless memories and a dancefloor that stayed alive until sunrise, the mission remains the same: bringing together everyone who's not quite ready for the journey to end.

This year, Keep It Roll proudly returns with the support of Let It Roll and joins forces with Bassgrave, alongside friends and artists from Belgium, the Czech Republic, France, Germany and the United Kingdom.

Expect Drum & Bass in all its forms, familiar faces, new connections and one final gathering before reality kicks back in.

Featuring artists from INSECT Crew, Black Soul, Bassgrave, Wildog and many more still to be announced.

The festival may end.

The roll never stops.

See you on the dancefloor.

House WE Love is the only house party in Prague offering you 6 hours of House music in vinyl, free entry!

Line up:

Nicco Lupen:
Nicco Lupen's journey as a DJ kicked off in 2005 when he fell in love with reggae and dancehall music. In 2008 he moved to Barcelona and after gracing major stages and top festivals, he paused in 2016 to explore new sounds. It was during this break that Nicco Lupen fell for the sounds and grooves of house music, which inspired him to get back to the decks DJing and producing again in 2020. Now, he's a familiar face in Prague's music scene and hosts a lively bi-weekly session on YouTube, diving back into his vinyl roots.

TEKLÁČ:
Growing up in the 90s, TEKLÁČ was influenced by Eurodance and MTV bangers. In Prague, he started attending parties at age 16 and joined a techno sound system, while also frequenting Roxy many times. At 17, TEKLÁČ began producing music and performing live sets.
He learned to play vinyl and built a substantial collection of 90s house and Eurodance tracks. Today, TEKLÁČ have a digital standalone player that he uses for street parties in Prague, collaborating with groups like Daylight Groovers and Aura Ritma Collective.

A free live promo shoot where guests become part of the official campaign. Dress dark, seductive, vampire-cyber-goth, and enter the world we are building.

Before ALT BABYLON begins on 21–22 August, Veil Amor and EDEN invite you to a special open promo photo & video shoot at Altenburg 1964 - (19 July 18:00–00:00).

This is a free event and everyone is welcome.

We are creating visual material for our upcoming project, so by joining you become part of the atmosphere, and may appear in the final photo and video campaign.

Dress Code / Visual Direction

We invite guests to come dressed in their darkest and most expressive looks:

dark leather, vampire glamour, cyber-gothic, underground nightlife energy.

The mood is inspired by the iconic 90s vampire-club aesthetic: dark leather, sensual, cinematic, futuristic, and intense.
Think of a dark underground rave world, with the energy of the legendary blood-rain scene from Blade.

The club will feature a special visual setup, including washable red color effects as part of the shoot. Please be prepared that some guests may appear as extras in the filming and may be lightly covered with washable red water/color.

You are welcome to enjoy the event, be creative, be bold, be kinky, and come as the wildest version of yourself.

This evening will become part of the official visual world and campaign of ALT BABYLON.

Free entry. Open event. Filming in progress. Everyone is welcome
Come with friends. Dress dark. Enter the frame.

party.nazevCz: RAVE & GEAR - The biggest LGBTQ+ & gear party
party.popis:
RAVE & GEAR

The biggest LGBTQ+ & gear party

August 7, 2026 | ROXY Prague

As Prague transforms into a celebration of freedom, diversity and self-expression during Pride Week, a new night arrives for everyone who lives for electronic music, authentic energy and open-minded community.

RAVE & GEAR is not just another Pride party. It's a rave where the music comes first and the community creates everything else.

RAVE & GEAR represents a new generation of queer rave events — where modern club culture meets gear, fetish aesthetics and underground rave energy. No judgment. No labels. No mandatory dress code.

Across two stages inside Prague's iconic Roxy Club, expect a powerful journey through Techno, Hard Techno, Bounce, Hard Groove and Trance. From hypnotic grooves and peak-time energy to euphoric sunrise moments that define true rave culture.

Inspired by today's European queer club scene, RAVE & GEAR is a space where individuality, creativity and self-expression are celebrated through music, movement and style.

Love gear culture? Wear it.

Leather? Harness? Sportswear? Rubber? Neon rave fashion? Clubwear?
You're welcome.

Prefer jeans and a t-shirt?
You're welcome too.

There is no mandatory dress code. However, gear culture is a central part of the event's identity and everyone is encouraged to express themselves and contribute to the atmosphere in their own way.

RAVE & GEAR welcomes all respectful attendees regardless of sexual orientation, gender identity or personal style.

SAFE SPACE POLICY

The following will not be tolerated:
• Violence of any kind
• Harassment in any form
• Discrimination or hateful behaviour
• Violation of personal boundaries

Respect for identity, self-expression and personal space is a fundamental principle of this event.

Consent is mandatory.

party.nazevCz: Časy se mění – zahájení festivalu Prague Pride 2026
party.popis:
Časy se mění, Prague Pride Festival zůstává. Přijď s námi odstartovat letošní ročník!

Zahájení festivalu je vždy výjimečným večerem, kdy se po dlouhé době společně sejdeme, potkáme staré známé tváře a opět okusíme jedinečnou Pride atmosféru, která nám celý rok tak chyběla. Čeká tě večer plný kultovních hitů a osobností, které spoluvytvářejí (nejen) českou queer scénu – od klubového a drag matadorstva po nově zrozené hvězdy. Večerem provází charismatický Jan Witek.

Začneme v 17:30 s dvojicí ostřílených DJ veteránů. DJ Henriette je zakladatelka projektu Freedom Night, která na české klubové scéně září od roku 2004 a pravidelně se vrací na stage Prague Pride Festivalu. Po jejím boku se představí DJ Vilém, jeden z nejdéle hrajících housových DJs v Čechách, jehož kariéra započala v roce 1992 legendárním klubu Radost FX. Jeho sety jsou proslulé živým hudebnictvem na pódiu.

V 19:00 se na řadu dostane matka českého dragu Chi Chi Tornado – kultovní postava české travesti & drag scény s nezaměnitelným projevem, smyslem pro recesi a láskou k show. Bytost, jejíž život by vydal na pořádný bestseller.

V 19:15 uvítáme Chica Checa Pala Santa – drag personu oceňovaného herce Jana Ciny, která vznikla při natáčení nového filmu Šimona Holého Chica Checa. Provede tě svým světem, zákulisím filmu i vlastními touhami. Bude se tančit — a kdo ví, co ještě.

Ve 19:45 dorazí z Bratislavy zpěvák a muzikálový herec Laco Hudec Šubrt, aby nám představil svou jedinečnou drag personu Laziza Vuitton – je to bytost, která není jen performer, ale přímo zážitek. Zrodila se z třpytek, vyrostla z potlesku a žije pro momenty, kdy dýchá se svým publikem. Odvážná, hlasitá, nezaměnitelná.

Večer završí od 20:00 speciální set DJ Jana Witka – hudební odysea Divas & Icons, která vzdává hold královnám a králům popu formujícím queer kulturu napříč dekádami. Od Madonny, Cher a George Michaela až po Lady Gagu, Chappell Roan a Troye Sivana.

Přijď oslavit hrdost, svobodu a hudbu, která nás spojuje a nutí tančit. Tohle bude nezapomenutelná noc, která otevírá letošní Prague Pride Festival. U toho nesmíš chybět!

party.nazevCz: Prague Rooftop Festival: Rooftop Sunset Party
party.popis:
Hudba • Západy slunce • Drinky • Bezkonkurenční výhledy

Informace od pořadatele:

Kapacita je přísně omezena! \
Kompletní kalendář, fotky a videa z akcí najdete na webu.

Často kladené otázky (FAQ)
- Jsou vstupenky vratné? Vstupenky jsou obecně nevratné. Pokud by však byla akce zrušena kvůli extrémnímu nepříznivému počasí, budou vám peníze za vstupenky vráceny v plné výši.
- Dají se vstupenky koupit na místě? Kapacita našich střešních teras je striktně omezená (ty nejlepší výhledy na Prahu si zkrátka žádají komornější atmosféru!). Důrazně proto doporučujeme rezervaci online předem. Pokud akce nebude vyprodaná, bude na místě k dispozici omezený počet „Last Minute“ vstupenek za vyšší cenu.

Pravidla vstupu
- Zákaz opakovaného vstupu: Jakmile jednou odejdete, vstupenka propadá. Uplatňujeme přísná pravidla zákazu návratu. Pokud se rozhodnete prostor opustit, budete si pro opětovný vstup muset zakoupit novou vstupenku.
- Pouze pro dospělé (18+): Při vstupu je striktně vyžadován platný fyzický průkaz totožnosti (občanský průkaz, pas nebo řidičský průkaz). Digitální kopie nebo fotografie průkazů v telefonu neakceptujeme.
- Právo na odmítnutí vstupu: V zájmu zachování skvělé festivalové atmosféry netolerujeme velké skupiny na rozlučku se svobodou (dámské ani pánské jízdy). Vyhrazujeme si právo odmítnout vstup komukoli, kdo se chová nevhodně nebo má na sobě tematický kostým/převlek.

Dress Code: Rooftop Chic / Smart Casual
- Hoďte se do gala! Buďte styloví, v pohodlí a připravení na západ slunce.
- Ano, prosím: Letní šaty, lněné kousky, společenské nebo plátěné kalhoty, stylové tenisky a
trendy klobouky.
- Není povoleno: Žabky/pantofle, sportovní kraťasy, oblečení do tělocvičny, plavky, pánská
tílka/trička bez rukávů, zcela rozepnuté košile nebo síťované a děrované svršky.

party.popis:
After seven years, the leading Polish trance DJ Nitrous Oxide is returning to Prague this summer for a special night at Pulse 22 on 8.8.2026, where he will be playing an extended 3‑hour set.

He is the first Polish DJ to achieve international status and is still one of the mainstays on the European scene. His career is mainly associated with the Anjunabeats label, but his tracks have been releases released by some of the biggest labels in the genre also, including Anjunabeats, Armada, Black Hole and Amsterdam Trance. His growing popularity quickly led him to perform at top electronic music events and festivals worldwide, such as Tomorrowland, A State Of Trance, Sensation, Creamfields, Sunrise, Euforia and many more.

Twice honored as Poland’s most popular DJ, Nitrous Oxide has an extensive discography spanning trance and progressive music. His catalog includes four studio albums. Over the years, he has continued to evolve, experimenting with different sounds while staying true to his uplifting and melodic style. His performances are known for their high-energy sets, captivating audiences across the world. Whether in a massive festival setting or an intimate club atmosphere, Nitrous Oxide’s music remains a staple in the trance community.
party.duvodSkore: Trance Family — komerčnější trance mainstream.

party.popis:
Po Holy Priest Open Air navazuje od 22:00 Outcasts Afterparty v klubu SaSaZu. Energie z venku se přesouvá dovnitř a nabírá na intenzitě. Prostor se ponoří do tmy a všechno se stáhne do silnějšího, koncentrovanějšího prožitku. Blíž k sobě, víc v momentu, víc pod tlakem noci.

Outcasts staví na tom, proč lidi chodí na tvrdou elektronickou hudbu: kvůli intenzitě, svobodě a napojení na parketu. Tohle je fáze, kde se to láme - žádné rozptýlení, jen čistý tah, který drží a nepustí. Všechno, co začalo venku, tady dostává tvrdší a hlubší podobu.

Lineup drží směr Outcasts: REKKT, tajný headliner a domácí jména, která formují aktuální hard techno scénu. Sety na sebe plynule navazují, energie se zahušťuje a roste s každou další hodinou.

Jedna noc. Dvě fáze. Venek a klub. Stejná energie, vyšší intenzita.
party.duvodSkore: Holy Priest afterparty v SaSaZu — tvrdý technoformат pro vytrvalce.

party.nazevCz: ELYSIA - BRAZILIAN FUNK at SALO with MANLIKEBEDI, Vialla, VIBECHIEF, DJ NÁVÍ
party.popis:
Elysia lands at SALO (Fuchs2) for its debut inside one of Prague's most iconic underground spaces.

After kicking things off earlier this year, Elysia returns with another night dedicated to the raw, high-energy sound of Brazilian Funk.

Rooted in the spirit of Brazil's baile culture while connected to Prague's underground, Elysia brings together DJs pushing everything from classic funk anthems to the latest underground sounds coming straight out of Brazil.

From 23:00 till LATE

Line up:

DJ Náví (BR)

DJ Náví, hailing from São Paulo, is an upcoming DJ on the Prague scene, bringing his eclectic mix of old and new funk, mixing heavy hits with good vibes - Get ready to shake your ass!

ManLikeBedi (BWA)

ManLikeBedi aka Reba is a Prague based dj popularly known for genre bending, mixing Baile Funk, afrobeats, hip hop, RnB, pop, latino, amapiano, afro house and funky house. He always guarantees to get the dancefloor dancing with a fine selection of edits and futuristic sounds. With 5 years of experiencing djing in Prague, his set is one not to miss.

VibeChief (SK)

VibeChief is the only authentic bridge between the Central European scene and the raw energy of Brazilian Funk.

A Slovak producer based in Prague, VibeChief stands apart from the European trend-chasers by bringing raw funk sound to central Europe. With little bit of brazil in his blood, he possesses a genuine connection to the rhythm and grit of the favela sound. His authenticity is certified by the Brazilian scene’s elite: from hosting DJ K in his Prague studio to collaborations with heavyweights like MC RD, MC Luis do Grau, and MC Marlon PH and MC MN, from whom hes got his producer tag “Vibechief, solta putaria porra!”.

Vialla (CZ)

Vialla is a contemporary artist and rising DJ in Prague’s underground scene, known for fusing contrasting rhythms into something bold and unfathomable. Her sets weave together the raw energy of baile funk, the intensity of latin bounce, and the edge of experimental club,
party.duvodSkore: Brazilský funk párty — masovka mimo Bobův vkus.
